sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66403" key="meshreu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσηρ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n66403.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be neutral</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1591.tlg001:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
